global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on the game and its features.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to unlock rare gear and play with friends.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and energetic base.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'PixelForge' displayed prominently in a bold font at the top left.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four circular game icons arranged in a grid pattern, each with a subtle outline and empty center.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A rectangular decorative element positioned above the main content area, featuring a light outline.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: Another rectangular decorative element similar to ID 4, positioned next to it, enhancing the layout.

elements.label: Right decorative element
elements.description: A small rectangular element on the right side, adding visual interest with a light outline.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A tiny circular icon located near the top, featuring a minimalistic design.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: Another tiny circular icon similar to ID 7, positioned slightly away from it.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: A small text element centered below the icons, conveying additional information in a simple font.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Another small text element similar to ID 9, positioned next to it for balance.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold headline stating 'Unlock rare gear' in a large, eye-catching font, centered in the main content area.
elements.text_content: Unlock rare gear Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Subheadline
elements.description: A smaller text below the headline that reads 'Play with friends tonight', providing context.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Learn more', designed to attract user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, PixelForge logo, game icons, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the headline is centered in the main area, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Unlock rare gear, Play with friends tonight, PixelForge, Learn more
